name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Simple dot
description: Mouse tracker effect with single cursor-following dot indicator.

name: Bordered circle
description: Mouse tracker effect with hollow ring cursor tracker with border-only styling.

name: Multi-dot trail
description: Mouse tracker effect with trailing sequence of dots that follow pointer movement.

name: Glow
description: Mouse tracker effect with soft glow aura that tracks pointer position.

name: Stretchy velocity blob
description: Mouse tracker effect with deformable blob reacting to pointer speed and direction.

name: Ripple rings
description: Mouse tracker effect with expanding ring ripples triggered by pointer movement.

name: Spotlight reveal
description: Mouse tracker effect with spotlight mask revealing content around the pointer.

name: Particle burst
description: Mouse tracker effect with particle bursts emitted along pointer movement path.

name: Crosshair
description: Mouse tracker effect with crosshair-style cursor replacement for precision emphasis.

name: Ink trail
description: Mouse tracker effect with ink-like trail with fluid motion decay behind cursor.

name: Gradient orbit
description: Mouse tracker effect with orbital gradient halo rotating around pointer position.

name: Spring emoji
description: Mouse tracker effect with emoji element that follows cursor with spring physics.

name: Magnetic text
description: Mouse tracker effect with text elements that attract toward nearby pointer movement.
